create_time.description: Timestamp when the secret version was created, useful for auditing changes

destroy_time.description: Timestamp when the secret version was destroyed, helpful for tracking lifecycle

enabled.description: Indicates if the secret version is active, ensuring proper resource usage

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the secret version in configurations

name.description: Full resource name for the secret version, required for API calls

secret_data.description: Contents of the secret version, accessible for application use
